subcodes.first_line: Thy letter hath reached the Most Great Prison time and again, and hath been favoured with the glances of loving-kindness of the Best-Beloved of the worlds, God willing [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتابت مره بعد مره در سجن اعظم وارد و بلحاظ عنایت محبوب عالمیان فائز انشاء الله
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for protection, @praise and encouragement, @transcendence; unknowability of God
